title: サーロー節子さん オーストリアで講演 核の脅威高まると懸念

title: ホルムズ海峡 船舶通過の動きも 戦闘開始前に比べると低調

title: あのサッカー選手もかつて“難民”だった 国連本部で作品展示

title: 米とイラン協議始まる 仲介国も参加しスイスで 覚書の署名後初
snippet: アメリカとイランの戦闘終結に向けた覚書の署名後、初めての協議がスイスで始まりました。イランは、レバノンでの停戦違反を訴え、ホルムズ海峡の再封鎖を主張していて、今後、協議が順調に進むかが焦点です。

title: Fuel sales halted in occupied Crimea as Ukraine targets oil facilities
snippet: Fuel had already been rationed due to shortages caused by Kyiv's attacks against supply routes in Russian-occupied territories.

title: Former Olympian denies vandalising Washington Reflecting Pool after arrest
snippet: Davey Hearn says he was simply touching the new paint at the site out of curiosity and did not remove or alter it.

title: Tight security as Indian students resit medical exam after alleged paper leak
snippet: Millions of candidates face biometric checks and frisking as air force deployed to secure exam papers.

title: Low-key funeral held for giant of the art world David Hockney
snippet: The artist, who passed away at his home in London earlier this month, requested just his partner and great-nephew attend.

title: Dutch royals enjoy two big results in one World Cup day
snippet: There may be about 5,000 miles between the Netherlands and their former colony Curacao but members of the Dutch royal family managed to see both sides play on Saturday.

title: Indian cricketer, 15, hits record-breaking 50 in just 11 balls
snippet: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi breaks the record for the fastest 50-over List A half-century in history on the same day he was not included in India's one-day international squad.
